summary: Comprehensive testing of Gemini 3 Flash Vision AI integration for anti-litigation photo analysis. Backend API tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical features verified working. The AI analysis endpoint successfully returns severity (Faible/Moyenne/Élevée), description in French, and confidence percentage. Admin Litiges tab displays all required information correctly.

minor.issue: Some base64 images cause Gemini API errors ('Invalid value at contents[0].parts[1].inline_data.data'). This is expected when malformed images are sent - the error is properly caught and displayed.

issues: Firestore permission errors appear in console (non-blocking, sync fails silently as expected)

passed_tests: Driver dashboard loads with 6 deliveries, eco-score 85 - PASS
Driver dashboard shows Photo buttons on in-transit deliveries - PASS
Admin dashboard shows plan badge 'Pro' - PASS
Litiges stats cards: Total rapports (3), Dommages détectés (1), Colis intacts (2), Confiance moy. (32%) - PASS
Damage report cards show severity badge (Faible/Inconnue) - PASS
Damage report cards show confidence % with progress bar (95%, 0%) - PASS
Damage report cards show AI description in French ('Analyse Gemini Vision' section) - PASS
Damage report cards show blockchain proof hash and timestamp - PASS
'Voir la photo' button present and functional - PASS
Photo preview loads when button clicked - PASS
Backend: POST /api/damage-reports returns ai_analysis with is_damaged, damage_severity, confidence, description - PASS
Backend: GET /api/damage-reports returns damage reports with has_photo flag - PASS
Backend: GET /api/damage-reports/{report_id}/photo returns photo base64 - PASS
Backend: Dashboard stats include active_litiges count - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Blockchain timestamping is MOCKED with SHA256 hash generation (as expected per requirements)
Firestore sync is non-blocking and fails silently with 'Permission Denied' - this is expected behavior
AI analysis gracefully handles errors and displays them in the UI with 'Analyse en erreur' section
seed_data_creation: Created test delivery TP-5A6ABD0A with TEST_DamageReportRecipient for damage report testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gemini Vision AI integration fully tested and working. Key test-ids: nav-litiges, litiges-tab, damage-report-{id}, load-photo-{id}, photo-preview-{id}. AI analysis returns French descriptions with severity (none/minor/moderate/severe), confidence (0-100%), and is_damaged boolean. Some test images may cause Gemini API errors if base64 format is invalid - this is handled gracefully.

working_example.description: L'image présente des annotations graphiques indiquant des dommages sur une surface brune. Deux lignes noires suggèrent des éraflures ou des incisions, et un cercle rouge met en évidence une zone spécifique d'impact ou de perforation. Le texte explicite 'FRAGILE - DAMAGED BOX' confirme la présence de dommages structurels sur le carton.
